metadata.desc: Controls framework default LLM replies based on an allowlist. Users in the allowlist trigger LLM normally, others are silently skipped.

allowlist.hint: One line per platform, format: platform[UID1,UID2,...]. Example: qq[123456,789012], discord[5678901234]. Users in the allowlist trigger the framework default LLM reply normally, others are silently skipped.
